meta.title: ChallanSetu – Settle Traffic Challans & Save 50%
meta.description: Challan Setu helps you settle traffic challans legally and save up to 50% on fines. We handle challans via Lok Adalat, direct settlement, and legal negotiation. Trusted by Delhi NCR vehicle owners. Free consultation.

footer.tagline: Zero convenience fee. Savings up to 50% based on challan details. Transparent and honest.
